heroHeadline: Recession Risk Climbs to 30–49%: FOMC Holds, Section 301 Probes Expand, Consumer Sentiment Near Historic Lows
heroSubtitle: Tracking macro warning indicators, central bank policy, and trade war escalation — Fed holds at 3.50–3.75% (Mar 18), USTR launches Section 301 probes into 16 economies (Mar 11), Michigan sentiment at 2nd percentile of history (55.5, Mar 13)
footerNote: Data sourced from IMF WEO, BIS, Federal Reserve FOMC, ECB Governing Council, BEA, BLS, World Bank, Tax Foundation, Conference Board, Penn Wharton Budget Model, Yale Budget Lab
